description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Visual Studio 2019 that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow should have two jobs, build_cmake and build_meson, both running on a Windows 2019 environment. The build_cmake job checks out the repository, sets up the environment, and builds the project using cmake. The build_meson job checks out the repository, sets up Python, and builds the project using meson.
